name: defaults block in PR-SOURCES.yaml can be regenerated from the shipped defaults file
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: [{id: stale-default}]\noperator_namespace: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/regenerate-defaults.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'cfpb-consumerfinance' .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && ! grep -q 'stale-default' .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
